name: Favorite Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon whole allspice tied in a bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the peppers.
2. Scald, peel, core, and quarter the tomatoes. Remove seeds and excess juice, then finely chop the pulp. Put the pulp in a large kettle and bring to a boil. Boil rapidly until the tomatoes are soft. Strain off the clear liquid that forms on top of the tomatoes while cooking.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the strained tomato pulp and cook for 30 minutes.
4. Discard the spice bag and continue cooking for about 1 hour longer, stirring occasionally.
5. Seal in hot sterilized jars.
Makes 4 - 6 Pints.
